results.title: Plane
results.description: Plane is an open-source project management tool for tracking issues, managing sprints, and organizing product roadmaps without the complexity of managing the tool itself.

results.description: Plane is an open-source all-in-one project management tool that helps teams manage issues, sprints, and roadmaps.

results.title: Sleek
results.description: Sleek provides best-in-class technology for webpage classification, semantic understanding, and shopping deals, offering SDKs, APIs, and white-label solutions to build amazing shopping experiences.

results.title: Planck Scheduler
results.description: Planck Scheduler is a library-agnostic scheduler for ECS systems inspired by Flecs and Bevy, featuring an ergonomic API, plugin system, and debugger integrations.

results.title: Plane
results.description: Plane is a modern, flexible, and intuitive project management software designed for teams of all sizes, offering integrated project and knowledge management, and available in both cloud and self-hosted options.

results.title: Trackingplan
results.description: Trackingplan is a marketing data monitoring and auditing tool that auto-discovers website and app configurations, detects errors, and simplifies debugging.

results.title: Sleek Template
results.description: Sleek Template is a minimal collection of LaTeX packages and settings designed for writing beautiful documents like theses, reports, and articles.

results.title: Headplane
results.description: Headplane is a feature-complete web UI for Headscale, providing a user-friendly interface to manage nodes, networks, and ACLs, aiming to replicate the functionality of the official Tailscale dashboard.

results.title: Planka
results.description: Planka is a self-hosted, open-source Kanban board for personal and team productivity, built with Docusaurus 2.

results.title: Plane
results.description: Plane is a project management tool that helps teams organize, track, and manage their work efficiently.

results.title: Bauplan
results.description: Bauplan is a cloud-native lakehouse platform for engineering teams, offering functions as a service for large-scale data pipelines and git-for-data over object storage data lakes.

results.title: Planck
results.description: Planck is a standalone, library-agnostic scheduler that allows users to execute code based on specific events, conditions, and order, compatible with various Luau ECS libraries.

results.title: SleekFlow Platform API
results.description: SleekFlow Platform API enables custom integration with SleekFlow's omni-channel social commerce platform for messaging, sales, promotion, and customer support.

results.title: MediaPlanPy
results.description: MediaPlanPy is an open-source Python SDK that provides tools for building, managing, and analyzing media plans, supporting multi-format data, schema validation, and flexible storage.

results.title: Skyvern
results.description: Skyvern automates browser-based workflows using LLMs and computer vision, providing a simple API to replace brittle or unreliable automation solutions with a more robust, adaptive approach.

results.title: OptaPlanner
results.description: Midstream of https://github.com/apache/incubator-kie-optaplanner

results.title: NotePlan
results.description: NotePlan is a note-taking and planning application that helps users organize their thoughts, tasks, and schedules.

results.title: PayPlan
results.description: PayPlan is a BNPL payment manager that helps users manage multiple Buy Now Pay Later loans across providers with a unified payment timeline, risk detection, and calendar export.

results.title: Bauplan
results.description: A collection of end-to-end use case examples for Bauplan, a serverless lakehouse platform, to learn its capabilities and build data applications.

results.title: Testplane
results.description: Testplane is a battle-hardened framework for testing web apps at any scale, across any browser and platform, offering developer-friendly features, visual testing, and effortless scalability.

results.title: RoomPlan
results.description: RoomPlan is an Apple framework that enables the creation of 3D models of interior rooms by guiding users to scan their physical environment using a device's camera and augmented reality.

results.title: Santiskills Dashboard
results.description: Santiskills Dashboard is a futuristic personal finance and productivity workspace with a React front-end, Tailwind styling, an OpenAI-powered AI copilot, Flask API for AI/chat, and optional Plaid financial account linking.

results.title: Control Plane
results.description: Control Plane is a hybrid platform enabling developers to deploy and manage backend apps across AWS, GCP, Azure, and other clouds, unifying them into a single, secure, Kubernetes-based global environment.

results.title: Native Planner Plus
results.description: Native Planner Plus is a Salesforce Lightning component that provides multiple visual planning interfaces (Gantt, Scheduler, Grid, Matrix, Kanban) for scheduling, project management, resource allocation, and workflow management.

results.title: Plan Harmony (llmstxt)
results.description: Plan Harmony is a collaborative trip planning app that helps users build itineraries, find activities, track budgets, and create memorable travel experiences with friends.

results.title: loq
results.description: loq is a fast, language-agnostic tool written in Rust that enforces file line limits to prevent oversized files and context rot, designed specifically for coding agents and LLMs.

results.title: Testplane
results.description: Testplane is a powerful tool for automating testing of user scenarios in web interfaces, offering features like parallel test execution, detailed HTML reports, screenshot comparison, and extensibility through plugins.

results.title: Skyvern
results.description: Skyvern automates browser-based workflows using LLMs and computer vision, replacing brittle automation solutions with a simple API.

results.title: X-Plane 12 SDK
results.description: An automated system that scrapes, processes, and monitors changes in X-Plane SDK documentation to ensure it is up-to-date and accessible for developers.
